name: topsoil-volume-calculator
label: Topsoil Volume Calculator
author: GIRISH PATHAK
description: This is a barebones, Topsoil Volume Calculator widget. It includes an example of how to use the config file, and it includes a placeholder SVG icon. It intentionally does not include the following so you can use this to start from scratch: i18n translations, a Settings panel, unit tests. See the documentation for more information on how to implement these features.
